description: Modal/remote agents without a local work_dir no longer get create_pr_url generated, because agent_repo is None and agent_prs_loaded defaults to False. In the old single-repo code, the global repo_path was used for all agents including modal ones. This is an intentional design consequence of multi-repo support (we cannot know which repo a modal agent belongs to), but it is a behavioral change. Not a bug.
Extra blank line between two consecutive assert statements in test_fetch_github_data_no_local_agents. This does not match the style of other tests in the file.
